summary: Complete end-to-end testing of mobile glass protection product management system with Arabic/English language support completed successfully. Backend API achieved 93% success rate, frontend UI fully functional with RTL/LTR support.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 403 instead of 401 for unauthenticated requests
minor_bugs.impact: Minor - both status codes are valid for this scenario

passed_tests: Backend API health check endpoints working
User registration with admin/user roles working
User authentication and JWT token handling working
Product CRUD operations (Create, Read, Update, Delete) working
Product search by name and phone model working
Admin-only endpoints properly protected (stats, product management)
Authorization working correctly (users can't access admin endpoints)
Frontend Arabic UI and RTL layout working perfectly
Frontend English UI and LTR layout working perfectly
User registration and login flow working end-to-end
Product creation form with bilingual support working
Products listing page with search and filters working
Responsive design and mobile shop theme working
